_description: Shared Layer-1 (WalletCore/WASM, packages/core) / Layer-2 (RN-JS/viem, packages/sdk) golden vector for an ERC-20 transfer on Polygon, in BOTH legacy and EIP-1559 form. Read via a plain readFileSync (not an import) by packages/core/mpc/tx/compile/compileTx.golden.test.ts AND packages/sdk/tests/unit/platforms/react-native/tx-builder-golden-vectors.test.ts, since packages/sdk does not depend on packages/core and a file read sidesteps the workspace dependency graph entirely. This is the SINGLE source of truth for this fixture - do not duplicate these values as literals in either test file.
_calldataNote: The two families do NOT share calldata construction either: the RN path encodes transfer(recipient, amount) via viem's encodeFunctionData, while WalletCore builds the same calldata internally from its ERC20Transfer proto message. Binding both to one expectedSigningHashHex therefore cross-checks selector + argument packing on top of RLP/typed-envelope encoding. expectedSigningHashHex is keccak-256 of the unsigned envelope - the value fed to MPC signing by both families.
